backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the TrackFlow app, defining types and state for users, habits, activities, payment requests, and coupons, with role-based access control, plan-limit enforcement, and CRUD operations for all entities.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines the old and new actor state shapes (users, habits, activities, payments, coupons) and provides a no-op `run` function since the schema is unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (actor availability fixes, dashboard data loading, habit creation, pricing page wiring, etc.) to their relevant frontend files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of hooks, pages, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the TrackFlow SPA, mounting the React app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all app routes (login, pricing, dashboard, habits, analytics, profile, admin, payment), wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and defines the authenticated AppLayout with a collapsible sidebar and footer.
frontend/src/components/activities/EditA: A modal dialog component for editing an existing activity, allowing users to update habit, name, start/end times, productivity flag, earnings, and notes, then submitting via the updateActivity mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/CouponMana: An admin UI component for creating and deleting discount coupons, displaying existing coupons in a table with code, discount percentage, usage limit, and expiry date.
frontend/src/components/admin/PaymentsQu: An admin component that lists pending payment requests in a table and provides approve/reject actions for each request.
frontend/src/components/admin/PlatformSt: Displays a grid of four stat cards (total users, activities, habits, payment requests) fetched from the platform stats query, with a skeleton loading state.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersTable: An admin table component that lists all users with search/filter support and allows admins to change and save each user's subscription plan.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Activi: Renders a sorted list of daily activities as a timeline card, supporting delete and edit (via EditActivityModal) actions for each activity entry.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AddAct: A form component for logging a new activity, allowing users to select a habit, set start/end times, productivity flag, earnings, and notes, then submitting via the useLogActivity mutation.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/HabitP: Displays a progress bar for a single habit showing total hours logged vs. goal hours for either a daily or weekly period based on the selected date.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/StatsC: A simple card component that displays a labeled stat value with a colored icon, supporting four color themes.
frontend/src/components/habits/HabitForm: A modal dialog for creating or editing a habit, with fields for name, goal type (daily/weekly), goal value, and color selection using preset colors.
frontend/src/components/habits/UpgradePl: A modal that informs users they've hit their plan's habit limit and presents upgrade options (Starter and Premium plans) with a link to the pricing page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A simple footer component displaying copyright info and a referral link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters based on the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: The main layout wrapper that renders a collapsible Sidebar alongside a content area with a Footer, managing the collapsed state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: A collapsible sidebar with navigation links, admin-conditional menu item, and a logout button, using tooltips when collapsed and integrating Internet Identity for auth.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state management using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, habits, activities, admin operations, payments, and coupons.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the TrackFlow indigo design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ActivitiesPage.tsx: Page component for viewing, filtering, paginating, bulk-deleting, and editing logged activities, with support for filtering by habit, productivity, and date range.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin-only page that verifies admin access and renders tabs for platform stats, user management, payments queue, and coupon management.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Analytics dashboard page displaying charts for time distribution, daily earnings, and productivity trends over selectable date ranges, with paid-plan gating for advanced features.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page that displays stats cards, activity timeline, and habit progress bars for a selected date, fetching data via React Query hooks for the authenticated user.
frontend/src/pages/HabitsPage.tsx: Habits management page that lists user habits in a grid, enforces plan-based habit limits, and provides create/edit/delete functionality via modals.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to the dashboard on success and displaying branding and feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page for plan upgrades that displays a UPI payment flow, supports coupon code validation for discounts, and submits a payment request with a transaction ID.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Pricing page showing Free, Starter, and Premium plan tiers with monthly/yearly billing toggle, handling plan selection with profile setup prompts and navigation to the payment page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: React page for viewing and editing user profile, including phone number, plan badge, activity stats, data export to JSON, and account deletion with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting known issues (actor unavailability, broken dashboard/habits/pricing), existing features, architectural notes about ICP canisters and Internet Identity, and fix request metadata.
